page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Fragmented antibiotic resistance gene ienntifier takes either fragmented metagenomic data or longer sequences as input and predicts and delivers full-length antiobiotic resistance genes as output
page_metadata.biotools__summary: fARGene (Fragmented Antibiotic Resistance Gene iENntifiEr ) is a tool that takes either fragmented metagenomic data or longer sequences as input and predicts and delivers full-length antiobiotic resistance genes as output.
